tipRules.tip: Wheeler: Use 14-pound fluorocarbon to get the DT-20 crankbait down in current when fishing ledge fish
Wheeler: Keep baits close to the bottom on ledges, but often burn them and kill it to trigger a strike — that retrieve variation produced key fish

knowledge.insight: Wheeler: Target smaller isolated schools rather than mega-schools that attract most anglers — the bigger fish often live in the smaller isolated schools with less pressure
Wheeler: Look for small subtle spots off the beaten path that other anglers miss, found during low-water periods; save your best spot for when you need it most in competition
Wheeler: When fishing ledges, keep baits on bottom but often burn them fast then kill the retrieve to trigger reaction strikes — this produced key fish at Chickamauga
